examples.title: Algorithm: Get Database Metadata
examples.description: Retrieve database metadata using DatabaseMetaData interface
examples.code:
ALGORITHM GetDatabaseMetadata
INPUT: Connection connection
OUTPUT: DatabaseMetaData metadata

BEGIN
 metadata = connection.getMetaData()
 RETURN metadata
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode retrieves database metadata from a given connection.

examples.title: Java: Get Database Metadata
examples.description: Retrieve database metadata using DatabaseMetaData interface in Java
examples.explanation: This Java code retrieves database metadata from a given connection and prints the database product name and version.

examples.title: Java: Get Result Set Metadata
examples.description: Retrieve result set metadata using ResultSetMetaData interface in Java
examples.explanation: This Java code retrieves result set metadata from a given result set and prints the number of columns.
